data.name: LanguageServerAlreadyRunningException_Message
data.value: The language server is already running.

data.name: LanguageServerAlreadyRunningException_Verbose
data.value: Verity the state of process ID {$PID}.

data.name: LanguageServerNotFoundException_Message
data.value: The server (LSP) could not be located at the configured location.

data.name: LanguageServerNotFoundException_Verbose
data.value: File '{$LSP_SVR_NAME}' was not found under the configured path: '{$PATH}'.

data.name: LetCoercionRuntimeErrorExceptionOverflow_Verbose
data.value: Source value is outside the range of the determined let-coercion destination data type and cannot be represented.

data.name: VBCompileError
data.value: Compile error (static semantics):

data.name: VBRuntimeError
data.value: Run-time error : #

data.name: VBRuntimeInternalError_BoundSymbolExpected_Verbose
data.value: A bound symbol was required to throw a let-coercion type mismatch, but the operand unexpectedly links an unbound '{$SYMBOLTYPE}' symbol.

data.name: VBRuntimeInternalError_LetCoercionRuntimeSemanticRulesOverlap
data.value: The let-coercion runtime semantic selectors are overlapping and more than a single rule matched.

data.name: VBRuntimeTypeMismatch_OperationEffectiveType_Verbose
data.value: No semantics defined an effective type for the specified operator data types ({$OPERANDS}).

data.name: VBRuntimeInternalError_WrongNumberOfOperands
data.value: Operator expression runtime semantics did not receive the expected number of operands for operator '{$OP}': VBTypedValue[{$LENGTH}].

data.name: VBSyntaxError_CustomMessage
data.value: Syntax error (grammar):

data.name: VBSyntaxError_DefaultMessage
data.value: Syntax error

data.name: LanguageServerProtocolSdkException_ServerNotInitialized
data.value: Language server was not initialized.

data.name: LetCoercionRuntimeErrorExceptionTypeMismatch_Verbose
data.value: Source value data type could not be let-coerced to the destination declared type during the evaluation of a let-coercion expression.

data.name: LetCoercionRuntimeErrorExceptionInvalidUseOfNull_Verbose
data.value: Destination data type could only be Null, Variant, or a fixed-sized array.

data.name: LetCoercionRuntimeErrorExceptionObjectRequired
data.value: The destination data type being an object or class type, the data type of the source value cannot be let-coerced, because an object is required for the source value.

data.name: LetCoercionRuntimeErrorExceptionObjectVariableNotSet
data.value: Source value 'Nothing' cannot be let-coerced to an object reference. This error usually denotes a missing 'Set' keyword, required for a reference assignment.

data.name: VBExponentOp_InvalidProcedureCallOrArgument_Verbose
data.value: The result of a negative exponent value cannot be represented with base 0.

data.name: VBRuntimeInternalError_LetCoercionStrategyWasNotApplicable
data.value: Let-coercion evaluation strategy unexpectedly returned a 'NotApplicable' result.

data.name: LetCoercionRuntimeErrorExceptionOutOfStackSpace_Verbose
data.value: This let-coercion operation is deterministically recursive. See evaluation stack details for more information.

data.name: VBRuntimeInternalError_LetCoercionStackCorruption
data.value: The internal let-coercion stack has reached an unexpected desynchronized state. Stack: {$FRAMES}, HashSet: {$HASH}.

data.name: VBRuntimeInternalError_EvaluateOperatorRuntimeSemanticsNullApplicableResult_Verbose
data.value: The evaluation of this expression unexpectedly yields a semantically invalid, unrepresentable result.

data.name: Verbose_FrameDetails
data.value: Frame details:

data.name: Verbose_LetCoercionStackTrace
data.value: Evaluation stack:

data.name: VBDivisionOp_DivisionByZero
data.value: This operation is dividing by zero. Consider adding a conditional check to avoid this.

data.name: VBRuntimeError_ArithmeticOverflow
data.value: This operation results in a value that the determined effective type cannot legally represent.

data.name: VBIntegerDivisionOp_DivisionByZero
data.value: This operation results in a division by zero, possibly due to Banker's Rounding losing enough precision to bring the operand value to integer value 0.

data.name: VBIsOp_ObjectRequired
data.value: Relational operator 'Is' requires an object in this context.

data.name: LanguageServerProtocolSdkException_ClientNotInitialized
data.value: Language client was not initialized.
